name: Finnish Sticks
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Stir in the almond flavoring.
3. Gradually add the sifted flour, mixing thoroughly.
4. Roll the dough into round lengths about the thickness of a finger using your hands.
5. Place the lengths close together on a baking sheet.
6. Brush each length with beaten egg and sprinkle with the mixture of chopped almonds and sugar.
7. Cut the lengths into 2-inch strips.
8. Bake in an oven preheated to 350 degrees Fahrenheit for about 15 minutes.
9. Makes approximately 50 cookies.
Variations: Roll the dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch, then cut into strips measuring about 2 inches by 1/4 inch.
